title: [FIRRTL] Change FInstanceLike to consider multiple referred modules
body:
This patch refactors the FInstanceLike interface to be able to handle operations that can reference multiple modules, such as InstanceChoiceOp.

The FInstanceLike interface previously provided default implementations for getReferencedModuleName/getReferencedModuleNameAttr that assumed a single referenced module. This doesn't work for InstanceChoiceOp, which can reference multiple module alternatives. Currently FInstanceLike is just a wrapper of InstanceGraphInstanceOpInterface but in subsequent PRs, port getters etc that are specific to FIRRTL will be added.

Tried to keep the only interface change but Dedup and Reducion passes were necessary to change.

For Dedup we still miss corresponding change to b49ac302d, and need to fix a follow-up (that said, it's low-priority because instance choice will never have class/object).
